signals.raw:
Democratic Party of New Mexico Pre-Primary Convention Confirms Deb Haaland's Strong Lead (73.52%) Over Sam Bregman in Governor's Race** | YES | HIGH confidence[2][4]

Delegates at the Democratic Party of New Mexico's pre-primary convention over the weekend voted decisively for Deb Haaland (733 votes, 73.52%) against Sam Bregman (264 votes, 26.48%), securing her ballot qualification and signaling D
